mentions.note: Breakthrough AI chip technology (4T transistors, 15–1000x faster inference) but IPO valuation of $185 (111x sales) exploded to $311 (187x sales). Company fundamentals excellent; stock overpriced at current levels. Cramer cannot recommend — wants to see giant pullback before reconsidering.

AI inference semiconductors, competitor to NVIDIA; biggest IPO of year before SpaceX (jumped 68%); was $311 when Cramer said too expensive, now $214 (lost ~30%); cautionary tale for buying hot IPOs at open—reminds of Figma; too rich even after pullback.
